user.title: Connect to SPR
user.description: Enter the address of your SPR router and the pairing token from the Home Assistant plugin (SPR UI → Plugins → home_assistant).

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the SPR router
data_description.port: Port of the ha_sync plugin API (default 8321)
data_description.token: Shown in the SPR UI on the plugin page

pair.title: Pair with {name}
pair.description: Found SPR at {host}. Enter the pairing token from the SPR UI (Plugins → home_assistant) to finish setup.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-pair with SPR
reauth_confirm.description: The pairing token was rotated on the router. Enter the new token.

abort.already_configured: This SPR router is already configured

data.track_new_devices: Enable tracking for newly discovered devices

data_description.consider_home: How long a device stays Home after it was last seen. Prevents phones that sleep their Wi-Fi from flapping.
data_description.track_new_devices: When off, trackers for new devices are added disabled and can be enabled per device.

wake_on_lan.name: Wake on LAN
wake_on_lan.description: Sends a Wake on LAN magic packet to a device on the SPR network.

mac.name: MAC address
mac.description: MAC address of the device to wake.
